Body.Content:
Easily summarize your email and attachments with Copilot chat. This will be available to Android and iOS users with a Microsoft 365 Copilot license who have pinning enabled. Updated April 21, 2026: We have cancelled rollout of this feature to Desktop, Mac, Web and both Classic and New Outlook for Windows at this time. We apologize for the inconvenience.

GA date: October CY2025
